actions.value:
If you are being asked to pay any kind of fee or taxes, to receive money.. it's very likely to be a scam attempt. Even without knowing any further details, there is almost never a legitimate situation that requires you to pay a small amount of money to receive a larger amount of money. Anyone communicating with you about this, is probably a liar and a scammer, attempt to sell you a lie, so they can simply run with your money. Going forward, please be cautious about giving any of your trust to online strangers who approach you out of the blue. There are a lot of scammers active today.

Please let me know if you have any more questions.
